text:
Market today: Yields are pulling back, which is good for growth names, but tariffs and geopolitical noise are headwinds. Tech wealth is fueling luxury goods, not necessarily your book.

Your holdings: SOXL (-38.11%) and SPAL (-52.96%) are leveraged ETFs showing significant drawdowns, amplified by margin. QQQ (-3.18%) and SMH (-8.83%) are also underwater. SPY (0.52%) is barely positive, but flagged for attention.

Watch: Keep an eye on Treasury yields. If they resume their climb, it'll pressure your tech-heavy portfolio.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and protecting your capital.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming this leveraged ETF, especially if it shows signs of further weakness. Its decay and your current loss are significant risks on margin.
SPAL: Similar to SOXL, this leveraged ETF is deeply underwater. Evaluate trimming to preserve capital, as margin amplifies these drops.
No new buys today - hold and watch
